item.title: About me
item.author: balladpanda@gamil.com (rockpandan(жңқдҝҠ))
item.description: Info Jimmy SongпјҲе®ӢеҮҖи¶…пјү Beijing, China рҹҮЁрҹҮі CNCF Ambassador Career iFlytek пјҲз§‘еӨ§и®ҜйЈһ) TalkingData Ant FinancialпјҲиҡӮиҡҒйҮ‘жңҚпјүcurrentвһЎпёҸжӢӣиҙӨзәіеЈ« Bio Jimmy Song is a Developer Advocate on Cloud Native at Ant Financial. He has
